name: retrato-js
description: Perfect balanced Photo Album javascript plugin

scripts.pretest: mkdir -p src/vendor && cp node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.js src/vendor/jquery.js && cp node_modules/mustache/mustache.js src/vendor/mustache.js && cp node_modules/watchjs/src/watch.js src/vendor/watch.js
scripts.build:js: concat -o dist/retrato-js.js src/album.js src/fast-blur.js src/highlight.js src/model.js src/mouse-timer.js src/resize.js
scripts.build: npm run clean && mkdir -p dist && npm run build:js && npm run build:min && npm run build:css

author: Ricardo Paiva
